name: synthesize_voice
description: Synthesize one client's audio voice-intro asset via ElevenLabs, from source text supplied by the builder specialist (site_copy.about or .headline — never invented, never summarized by the tool itself). Called by the builder specialist itself, inside the site-build pipeline, as a tool call embedded in that specialist's own turn — not a separate specialist role. On first synthesis for a client this also provisions a new ElevenLabs voice profile and returns its id for brand_strategist to persist into ClientBrandMemory.voice_profile_ref on the next pass; on a re-brand pass, passing the existing voice_profile_ref reuses that same provisioned voice instead of minting a new one. A site_draft missing this asset is a voice_qa fail (screenshot_and_gate check), not a partial pass. Fails clearly (fail-loud, non-retryable message) when ELEVENLABS_API_KEY is unavailable, or when client_id resolves to no known client, rather than silently degrading or returning a placeholder asset.

client_id.description: Client this synthesized voice asset belongs to; threaded through to output and downstream fleet events. Never inferred — must be passed through explicitly per FLEET ISOLATION.

source_text.description: Exact text to synthesize, sourced verbatim from site_copy — never invented, paraphrased, or summarized by the tool. Must trace back to source_text_ref.

source_text_ref.description: Which site_copy field the source_text came from, e.g. 'site_copy.about' or 'site_copy.headline'. Carried into the output asset's provenance so voice_qa can trace the audio back to the exact copy it was synthesized from.

voice_profile_ref.description: Existing ElevenLabs voice profile id for this client, if a prior voice asset already exists (re-brand or repair pass). Omit on this client's first-ever synthesis so the tool provisions a new profile.

output_dir.description: Client's own preview_dir (from the in-progress site_draft). The tool rejects any resolved output path that escapes this client's own directory, per FLEET ISOLATION — no client's synthesized asset may land in or overwrite another client's directory.

build_id.description: The site_draft.build_id this synthesis call is part of, so a failed or retried synthesis can be traced back to the specific build pass that requested it.

asset_url.description: URL/path of the synthesized audio file within output_dir, to be recorded as a site_draft.media_assets entry with type 'audio' and source_tool 'synthesize_voice'.

voice_profile_ref.description: ElevenLabs voice profile id, newly created on a first-synthesis call or the same one reused on a re-brand call, to persist into ClientBrandMemory.voice_profile_ref context on the next brand_strategist pass.

voice_profile_created.description: True if this call had to provision a new ElevenLabs voice profile because voice_profile_ref was omitted or not found; false if an existing profile was reused.

duration_s.description: Duration of the synthesized audio in seconds.

usage.description: Provider usage/cost for this synthesis call, rolled up into ClientPipeline.usage then the fleet-level total, per artifacts.md's usage-rollup rule.

tokens_in.description: Input character/token count billed by ElevenLabs for this synthesis, if reported.

tokens_out.description: Output token count, if reported by the provider; 0 for pure audio-duration billing.
